features: *THE POWER OF NATURE: We capture the intensity nature has to offer. Original Source is made with 100% natural fragrances, we‚Äôre inspired by nature, from our bold scents and vibrant colours, we've made it our mission to share fresh sensorial hits in every shower.
*MAX BOOST SHOWER GEL: Made with Vitamin B which is known to help keep skin healthy & feeling super soft.
*GINGER & YUZU: Revitalising and zingy Ginger & Yuzu fragrance that stimulates the senses to give an energising MAX BOOST to kickstart your day!
*100% VEGAN & CRUELTY FREE: Original Source is proudly vegan, and we carry the logo on all our products. Our products are tested on us, never on animals.
*SHOWER GEL MUTLIPACK: Extend your daily dose of freshness and nature with this 6 x 400ml shower gel multipack.
description: Product Description Feeling the drain? Need a morning boost? Turn the dial UP with NEW Original Source MAX Boost Ginger & Yuzu Shower Gel for instant freshness! A shower gel multipack with 6 bottles bursting with 100% natural fragrance to invigorate your senses + Vitamin B, leaving you feeling refreshed and ready to kickstart your day. Even better, our products are tested on us, never on animals and we‚Äôre proud to be Vegan too. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Benzoate, Parfum, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Lactic Acid, Glycol Distearate, Glyceryl Oleate, Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Zingiber Officinale (Ginger) Root Extract, Citrus Junos (Yuzu) Peel Extract, Panthenol, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate, Citral, Eugenol, Geraniol, Limonene, Linalool, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Citrus Limon Peel Oil, Pinene, CI 15985. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. See more
